caption:
Dubai Frame Ticket prices (2025) 👇

General Admission (Adults): AED 50 (~$14 USD)
Children (3–12 years): AED 20 (~$5.50 USD)
Infants (under 3 years): Free 🎉

You can buy tickets online or at the entrance.

Opening hours from 8:00 am till 09:00 pm.
